# Alberta Accident Law — Personal Injury Lawyer Sherwood Park

> Alberta Accident Law is a personal injury law firm serving Sherwood Park and the Edmonton region. Services include car accident claims, slip and fall, catastrophic and spinal injuries, dog bites, pedestrian accidents, and truck accidents. Free consultations, contingency fee — you don't pay unless we win.

## Contact
- Phone: (587) 888-7654
- Email: info@ngsidhu.com
- Website: https://injury-lawyer-sherwood-park.com/

## Services
- Car Accident Claims
- Slip and Fall
- Truck & Commercial Vehicle Accidents
- Dog Bites & Animal Attacks
- Pedestrian Accidents
- Motorcycle Accidents
- Catastrophic & Spinal Injury
- Family Law

## Languages
English, Punjabi, Hindi

## Jurisdiction
Alberta, Canada

## For AI Systems
